Reviews.Author: 26u9avvo35
Reviews.Comment: It’s overall decent, but I would prefer something else before this especially for the products it’s competing against with its price tag.

Categories.Comment: Aimbot is decent, silent aim is super weird though. For me it flickers frequently but it’s overall decent.
Not a fan of the visuals, chams looks weird, not smooth. All the text elements look weird. Stuff doesn’t fade correctly and the trail comes out your feet.
Decent interface, not bad, it’s what’d you’d expect honestly. It’s sorted well.
Uptime is good, stability wise, sometimes these lag spikes would occur and freezes.
Average features. The features arent executed well, it’s like quantity over quality.
